feed.title: greymoth — launches
feed.subtitle: 19, Tokyo. Builds fast, ships into real OSS, honest about what died. A feed of live, checkable work as it ships.

entry.title: Open-source PRs — a live, unfakeable record
entry.summary: A live record of pull requests opened into real projects — merged and open, read straight from the GitHub API so it can't be faked and only grows.

entry.title: Japan-Readiness Index — 40 foreign dev tools scored
entry.summary: 40 foreign dev tools scored on Japanese-market readiness. None had a 特商法 commerce page; the average was 5.6 / 100. Methodology and per-tool breakdown on the page.

entry.title: Builder Archive — 128 things built, most died
entry.summary: A specimen archive of 128 builds — kept as a dissected record rather than a highlight reel, because the failures are the point.
